rulings.Case Title: ALLISON LESHEFSKY VS. RENKA PROP, LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Relief For Defendants To Bring Motion For Leave To Amend Answer And Bring Cross Complaint On Shortened Time Mpa
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT RENKA PROP, LLC, ANNE SWAIN Motion For Relief For Defendants To Bring Motion For Leave To Amend Answer And Bring Cross Complaint On Shortened Time Mpa is OFF CALENADAR. No Notice of Motion and no Motion filed in violation of CRC. No proof of service for the Order Shortening Time on file. The Court notes, without making any rulings on the merits, that no authority was cited for the proposition that CCP 473(b) relief applies to a request for shortened notice for motions for leave to file non-compulsory cross-complaint or of leave to amend answer. Further, no evidence presented to show that failure to bring claims in the cross-complaint in this action or to raise affirmative defenses caused or could cause a default. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SIENNA DUNN ET AL VS. MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Mercy Housing Management Group, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 2, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT MERCY HOUSING MANAGMENT GROUP, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendant Mercy Housing Management Group, Inc.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or, In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Moving party failed to comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Assuming that all evidence provided by the moving party is admissible, there still is a triable issue of fact regarding the conditions, maintenance and response time to tenant's concerns. =(501/CFH)
